query: Skydance New Media Lucasfilm Games Star Wars interactive project official title

mako.raw:
{"query":"Skydance New Media Lucasfilm Games Star Wars interactive project official title","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1569,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://skydance.com/news/skydance-new-media-and-lucasfilm-games-team-up-for-a-new-star-wars-project/","title":"Skydance New Media and Lucasfilm Games Team Up for a New Star Wars™ Project - Skydance Media","content":"April 19, 2022 – Skydance New Media, helmed by award-winning writer and director Amy Hennig, today announced a collaboration with Lucasfilm Games to develop and produce a richly cinematic action-adventure game featuring an original story in the legendary Star Wars™ galaxy.
She and the Skydance New Media team have the talent and ambition to create a unique Star Wars adventure,” said Douglas Reilly, Vice President, Lucasfilm Games.
We’re working hard with their team of experienced and talented developers, and we’re looking forward to sharing more with Star Wars fans when the time is right.”
This is the second significant project announced for the game studio, which was formed by Hennig and veteran producer Julian Beak to pioneer a new category of narrative-driven interactive entertainment.
In late 2021, the studio announced a partnership with Marvel Entertainment to craft an all-new game with an original story and their unique take for beloved Marvel characters.
“We couldn’t be happier to be working with Lucasfilm Games,” said Beak, Executive Vice President & GM, Skydance New Media."},{"url":"https://www.gamedeveloper.com/business/skydance-new-media-announces-a-new-star-wars-game-with-amy-hennig","title":"Skydance New Media announces a new Star Wars game with Amy Hennig","content":"There's no mention about Hennig's prior work in Lucasfilm Games' announcement about the title, except for a reference from company vice president Douglas Reilly about being thrilled to work with her "again."
She left EA about seven months before EA Vancouver's Star Wars project was shelved.
Since 2019, Stadia has shed itself of its in-house game developers, though Detroit: Become Human Quantic Dream is also working on a Star Wars game."},{"url":"https://www.lucasfilm.com/what-we-do/games/","title":"Games | Lucasfilm.com","content":"The story of Cal Kestis continues in Star Wars Jedi: Survivor, a third-person galaxy-spanning action-adventure game from Respawn Entertainment, developed in collaboration with Lucasfilm Games.
This narratively-driven, single-player title picks up five years after the events of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order and follows Cal’s increasingly desperate fight as the galaxy descends further into darkness."},{"url":"https://starwars.fandom.com/wiki/Paramount_Games_Studio","title":"Paramount Games Studio | Wookieepedia | Fandom","content":"On April 19, 2022, it was announced that a new Star Wars video game was being developed by Skydance New Media and published by Lucasfilm Games.
On June 5, 2026, it was announced that Skydance New Media was being merged with her sister studio, Skydance Interactive, to form a new entity: Paramount Games Studio."},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/business/digital/skydance-new-media-lucasfilm-original-star-wars-game-1235131671/","title":"Skydance New Media, Lucasfilm Team to Develop 'Star Wars' Game","content":"“I’ve often described how seeing Star Wars in 1977 essentially rewired my 12-year-old brain, shaping my creative life and future indelibly,” said legendary game developer and Uncharted co-creator Amy Hennig, who formed AAA studio Skydance New Media together with Electronic Arts veteran Julian Beak, in 2019.
Douglas Reilly, vp of Lucasfilm Games, added: “We couldn’t be more thrilled to be working again with Amy.
Its first project, announced last October, is a narrative game developed in partnership with Marvel Entertainment."}]}

She and the Skydance New Media team have the talent and ambition to create a unique *Star Wars* adventure,” said Douglas Reilly, Vice President, Lucasfilm Games. This is the second significant project announced for the game studio, which was formed by Hennig and veteran producer Julian Beak to pioneer a new category of narrative-driven interactive entertainment. “We couldn’t be happier to be working with Lucasfilm Games,” said Beak, Executive Vice President & GM, Skydance New Media.","score":0.838376,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2022/04/original-star-wars-action-adventure-video-game-in-the-works-from-lucasfilm-skydance-new-media-1235005199","title":"Original 'Star Wars' Action-Adventure Video Game In The Works","content":"# Original ‘Star Wars’ Action-Adventure Video Game In The Works From Lucasfilm, Skydance New Media. #### More Stories By Alexandra. Skydance New Media and Lucasfilm are teaming to develop a new *Star Wars* game. Revealed Tuesday by New Media’s Amy Hennig, Skydance will work with Lucasfilm to develop and produce “a richly cinematic action-adventure game featuring an original story inthe legendary *Star Wars* galaxy.” News of the *Star Wars* project comes several months after Skydance New Media unveiled the development of a Marvel game back in October. Added Douglas Reilly, VP of  Lucasfilm Games: “We couldn’t be more thrilled to be working again with Amy. She and the Skydance New Media team have the talent and ambition to create a unique*Star Wars*adventure. While the in-development project marks Skydance New Media’s second significant initiative, *Star Wars* has been in gaming for many years with the likes the *Lego Star Wars* franchise, *Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order* and *Star Wars Battlefront*, among others. ### More Expand the sub-menu.","score":0.7018975,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://starwars.fandom.com/wiki/Paramount_Games_Studio","title":"Paramount Games Studio","content":"in: Real-world companies, Computer and video game companies. Amy Hennig and her Skydance New Media studio have announced a collaboration with Lucasfilm Games on a brand new Star Wars game. According to starwars.com, Amy will develop and produce a narrative-driven, action-adventure game featuring an original story in the Star Wars galaxy.

More in the press release here: https://www.starwars.com/news/amy-hennig-skydance-new-media-star-wars-game

More on Amy Hennig here: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amy_Hennig

More on Project Ragtag, her previous Star Wars game that was cancelled by EA, here: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Project_Ragtag

------
